Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties, LLC is present. Represented by Donna Stern.
Attorney Marina Franco for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sam Davis is present.
Attorney Hope L. Greenhill appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Tom Drohan, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of OCT-28-2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
